title: Heart of Spartan
description: Added Spartan weapon variants for the Heart of Ender mod
body:
This Mod adds compatibility between Spartan Weaponry and Heart of Ender by adding azurium and milathium weapons.

So you will be able to fight monsters with this new equipment.
![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/O88LAjnP/images/3194be211401a6d15c6eb0d834afaa2ecfebcd80.png)

![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/O88LAjnP/images/8beee1c2fbde7830ba0361eddedfd8ca8085a637.png)

Weapons:
![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/O88LAjnP/images/911e0ff0ce144a315df07d0ea3de5d9fe33b6ecb.png)

Tabs:
![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/O88LAjnP/images/ece0a93a36aa62ee635c4bcf5e07a6fb646e5c54.png)

Depedencies:

- Heart of Ender
- Spartan Weaponry
